incidents.title: Planner responses timing out during kickoff

status_updates.message: We are investigating reports that kickoff requests are timing out. New projects may fail to generate topics.
We have identified elevated latency from our LLM provider. Existing projects and topic interviews are unaffected.
We have switched to a fallback model pool. Latency is recovering.
Resolved. Kickoff times are back to normal. Total duration: 1h 54m. A post-mortem will be published within five business days.
